## GOALS
- muscle_building
Additional details: Hypertrophy focused - want to gain 15 more lbs of muscle. Former skinny guy, dedicated to getting bigger and stronger. Increase main lifts, look more athletic. Long-term 6-8 month timeline.

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- Desired training frequency: 5

### Experience
- Level: Intermediate
- Details: 18 months of consistent training. Started at 145 lb, now 165 lb. Eating in surplus. Enjoys tracking progressive overload and hitting PRs. Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri/Sat at 6 PM, 75 min sessions.

### Equipment & Environment
- Training location: Commercial gym
- Setup details: Commercial gym - full equipment
- Available equipment: barbells, Dumbbells, machines, cables

### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Jordan Phillips  
- **Age:** 27  
- **Gender:** Male  
- **Experience level:** **Intermediate** — 18 months consistent training (as of 2026-02-27); started ~145 lb and now ~165 lb while eating in a surplus; enjoys tracking progressive overload and PRs.

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):** Hypertrophy-focused muscle building — **gain +15 lb lean muscle** and look more athletic while increasing main lifts (timeline **6–8 months**, as of 2026-02-27).
- **Secondary goals:**
  - Get “bigger and stronger” (strength increases as a support outcome to hypertrophy)
  - Maintain consistency with progressive overload and PR-driven training
- **Target events/deadlines:** None specified (time horizon: 6–8 months)

---

### TRAINING CONTEXT

#### Schedule & Availability

- **Blocked days:** **Wed/Sun** (reason not specified)

#### Equipment & Environment
- **Location:** Commercial gym
- **Equipment available:** Barbells, dumbbells, machines, cables (full commercial setup)

#### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE]** None reported (as of 2026-02-27)
- **[RESOLVED]** None reported

#### Preferences
- Likes/training style: Progressive overload, tracking lifts, hitting PRs
- Focus areas: Hypertrophy + “main lift” strength carryover; overall athletic look

---

### LOG
## 2026-02-27 — Profile created/updated (hypertrophy focus)
- Set primary goal: hypertrophy-focused muscle building; aim to add **~15 lb muscle** over **6–8 months**.
- Confirmed training experience: **18 months consistent**, weight increased **145 → 165 lb**, currently eating in a surplus.
- Confirmed schedule: **5x/week** (Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri/Sat), **6 PM**, **~75 min** sessions.
- Confirmed environment: commercial gym with barbells/dumbbells/machines/cables.

**Needed to complete metrics (next update):** current working sets or recent bests for squat/bench/deadlift/OHP, pull-ups/rows, and any body measurements (waist, chest, arms) or estimated body fat %.
